The UI is soooo clean and easy to use. Absolutely love the ability to export.  
One small piece of feedback - it would be cool and useful to have a ringtone or beep alerting you for when your prompt is ready.

Great call on the alert: right now we send email notifications when a new app is created, but an in-app sound or notification would definitely make the flow smoother. Appreciate the feedback!

results.title: LaReview: Open-source free next-generation code review | Product Hunt
results.content:
Zabbar

what all platforms are supported for this?

Report

Shy Alter

LaReview

LaReview

Maker

@zabbar MacOS, Linux, Windows (WSL)

Report

Mykola Kondratiuk

running code review through an AI agent is solid. whether it blocks or just suggests matters a lot - one is a tool, the other is actually an authority in the workflow.

Report [...] Hey Product Hunt 🥒 I built LaReview because the DX of code review has barely changed in years. We still scroll diffs, jump between files, and hold too much context in our heads. Most new AI review tools just add more comments on top of the same old workflow. I wanted to try a different approach. Instead of layering more output onto the diff, LaReview restructures the review itself. A PR or unified diff is turned into a task tree, so you start with intent and then validate changes step by step, only seeing the hunks that matter for the current task. Another big motivation was cost and control. If I already run a coding agent locally, I do not want to pay again for a bundled AI. LaReview uses the agent you already have via ACP and fetches PRs through your own GitHub CLI. No servers, no [...] Subscribe

LaReview

# LaReview

## Open-source free next-generation code review

Code Review Tools

LaReview turns a GitHub PR or unified diff into a structured review plan. Instead of scrolling files, you review intent, tasks, and relevant hunks in a deliberate order. Everything runs locally using your own GitHub CLI and AI agent.

#### What's great

As a data guy, it's been cool to see a tool that doesn't require complex integrations or data pipelines to serve up value. Cotera has been awesome to integrate AI in a way that helps less technical audiences to automate their data while the data stays in its source.
